mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, specification, unit, price, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM products ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, specification, unit, price, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId}
